name: Mickey Boudin
subtitle: silent owner of Le Roulant · six months in

ultimate_ability.label: Close The Table
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Pull a table from active play regardless of players present: reroute all patrons at that space to adjacent spaces. The night writes itself around the closure.

notes: Mickey's hand for the Wheel of Fortune arcana. TILT is the second stat (renamed LINGERING / STAKES per scenario). Scenarios: the_house_edge (canonical), the_after_hours_count (easier decompression), the_service_call_saturday (hardest disclosure morning).
